headline: Fortive Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
summary: EVERETT, Wash., April 02, 2026--Fortive Corporation ("Fortive") (NYSE: FTV) today announced that it will webcast its earnings conference call for the first quarter 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026, beginning at 12:00 p.m. ET and lasting approximately one hour.
